modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to add a missing location in 25Live.

full_description_text:  
During a live chat session, the user attempted to add a new location to 25Live but encountered difficulties. The location they were trying to include was missing from the system, preventing them from completing their task. This issue has created a barrier to effectively managing scheduling within the platform.
short_description: Unable to add a missing location in 25Live.
description: During a live chat session, the user attempted to add a new location to 25Live but encountered difficulties.
